title: ibidium odoratum
intro: Ibidium odoratum, also known as the stinking chamomile, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ibidium odoratum include its ability to treat digestive issues, soothe skin irritations, and even alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
